questions.question: What European country has a name that means "people from Rome"?
What actor asked Paramount not to open Titanic on the same weekend as Air Force One?
What celebrated U.S. battleship was affectionately dubbed "Mighty Mo"?
What planet has the shortest day, at 10 hours?
Who became the first coach since Don Shula to take two different teams to Super Bowls?
What charges did Cincinnati drop against a man struck by a truck, when they discovered he was blind and had been using his cane?
